chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6320 of 2023 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For order on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA No.29507/2023 3. For hearing of main case 22-04-2025 Mr. Taimur Ahmed Qureshi, advocate for the petitioner. Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Mahreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Under instructions learned counsel for the respondent states that notice/ summon dated 04.12.2023, available at page-23, is being withdrawn forthwith subject to right of the respondent to initiate any proceedings as may be permissible under the law. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
